block.cbc_firepower_components.compact_c: Left shaft: place the cannon or autocannon here.
Side shafts: kinetic input for pitch.
Top/Bottom shaft: kinetic input for yaw.
Front face: redstone fire control; wrench front/back to swap.
Back face: redstone assembly control; wrench front/back to swap.
After assembly: item input is forwarded to the mounted cannon.
block.cbc_firepower_components.compact_a: A light side-mounted turret for autocannons.
Left shaft: place an autocannon or handle autocannon here.
Side shafts: kinetic input for pitch.
Top/Bottom shaft: kinetic input for yaw.
Front face: redstone fire control; wrench front/back to swap.
Back face: redstone assembly control; wrench front/back to swap.
After assembly: item input feeds the mounted autocannon.
block.cbc_firepower_components.autocanno: Feeds loose autocannon rounds into adjacent assembled compact mounts.
Accepts loose autocannon ammunition from hoppers, funnels, and arms.
Outputs ammunition only into adjacent assembled compact autocannon mounts.
block.cbc_firepower_components.cannon_ma: A three-round external magazine for assembled CBC big cannon mounts.
Automation inserts projectiles first, then powered big cartridges in matching columns.
Mechanical input waits for all three ammunition pairs before a loading cycle starts.
The sides, back, and bottom output spent empty big cartridges.
Manual insertion and removal are always allowed.
item.cbc_firepower_components.cannon_lim: Stores pitch and yaw limits on compact cannon mounts.
Right-click air to configure this limiter.
Right-click a mount to install; sneak-right-click a mount to remove its limiter.
Sneak-right-click a mount to clear the current mode.
Use the limiter on a compact cannon mount or compact autocannon mount.
Configure at least one limit before installing the limiter.
This mount already has a limiter. Sneak-right-click to remove it first.
This mount has no limiter installed.
screen.cbc_firepower_components.cannon_l: Pitch lower limit. Negative angle, from 0° down to -90°.
Pitch upper limit. Positive angle, from 0° up to 90°.
Left yaw limit. Negative signed yaw from the mount's neutral direction.
Right yaw limit. Positive signed yaw from the mount's neutral direction.
block.createbigcannons.cannon_carriage.h: Rate of fire: %s RPM (set signal strength on firing side to change)
Rate of fire: %s RPM (set signal strength on firing side to change)
